analysis:
## Current Options Opportunities

**Best CSP:**
PLTR $120 strike, 2026-06-18, 42 DTE, $3.40/$3.50 bid/ask, 0.24 delta, 25.0% annualized return
- Excellent timing with 81% IVP + quality pullback

**Best CC:**
None qualify - TSLA has great returns but IVP too low (27%), existing position CCs available but don't meet standalone criteria

**Best LEAPS:**
MSFT $195 strike, 2028-01-21, 624 DTE, $230.00/$234.50 bid/ask, 0.99 delta, 5.3% extrinsic
- Mixed timing (91% IVP expensive but near 52w low), currently in downtrend so wait for stabilization

**Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available

**Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL $420 strike, 2026-06-18, 42 DTE, $9.05/$9.30 bid/ask, 0.33 delta, 20.1% annualized return
- Strong profit position with excellent IV environment

**IVP Environment:** Mixed conditions - PLTR/MSFT showing 80%+ IVP (premium selling favorable), but TSLA at 27% IVP (poor for premium selling). Quality opportunities limited by extended moves in many names.
